inputs.text: Mujhe bahut thakaan mehsoos ho rahi hai, bukhar bhi hai aur sar dard hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever, malaise, and headache are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can also cause similar symptoms

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, typhoid is less likely at this stage without more specific symptoms

inputs.text: Mujhe bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard bhi ho raha hai aur kabz ki problem bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and abdominal pain are indicative of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can cause similar gastrointestinal symptoms

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely given the progression of symptoms

inputs.text: Mujhe tez bukhar hai, kabz ke baad dast ho raha hai aur bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai
inputs.image_desc: red rash on arms and chest

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of high fever, diarrhea after constipation, and severe weakness are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis is less likely given the severity of symptoms and the presence of a rash

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria could be considered, but the specific pattern of symptoms points more towards typhoid

inputs.text: Mujhe abhi bhi bukhar hai, bahut thakaan mehsoos ho rahi hai, aur pet dard se pareshan hun

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The persistence of high fever, exhaustion, and abdominal pain confirms typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the prolonged nature of symptoms and specific signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out as the symptoms and signs do not align with malaria
